content_of_post_to_answer: What are the best online personality/leadership development courses?
answer: The best leadership courses are rarely the ones that teach only communication tricks or personality labels. The deeper value comes from learning how your behavior changes under pressure, feedback, conflict, and responsibility. A good course should create self-awareness plus opportunities to practice new habits. I’ve written more about this connection between self-awareness and leadership growth on my profile, if you want a deeper look. The strongest leaders are not built by collecting skills; they are built by understanding the patterns behind their actions.
